ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "starttime" TEXT /* Time when the data was recorded */,
  "area" REAL /* Area associated with the data */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Count or sequence number of the data entry */,
  "licor" INTEGER /* Licor value, indicating sensor type or model */,
  "ind_id" INTEGER /* Individual identifier for the data entry */,
  "tape" TEXT /* Tape color, potentially indicating a specific sensor or batch */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "value" REAL /* The actual environmental measurement (e.g., CO2 level) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., ppm) */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate the initial quality status of the data (e.g., 0 for unchecked, 1 for valid, 2 for invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_ind_id FOREIGN KEY ("ind_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_due" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate type of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being checked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data (e.g., valid, invalid, needs review) */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who checked the data */,
  "checked_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was checked */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data quality check */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being analyzed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analyzed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_analyzed_by FOREIGN KEY ("analyzed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data in the context of the report */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart or visualization used for the data */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used to analyze the data for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the external system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the integration */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the external system */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the integration is enabled */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Date and time of the last successful synchronization */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of synchronization (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the integration */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data transfer (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "response_data" TEXT /* Response data from the external system */,
  "request_data" TEXT /* Request data sent to the external system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_logs_integration_id FOREIGN KEY ("integration_id") REFERENCES integrations ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry that triggered the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold, anomaly) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "received_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was received */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., read, unread, action taken) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_recipients_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_recipients_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)
